jsonLd.title: Junior SEO Specialist at Craftsvilla
jsonLd.description:
Craftsvilla invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of SEO Specialist at our Srinagar location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Craftsvilla:
Craftsvilla is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Content Writing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Craftsvilla!
